NewLine(Enter)

Time

00:00.00

キー入力と同時にスタートします

NAME
pwd -- return working directory name
DESCRIPTION
The pwd utility writes the absolute pathname of the current working directory to the standard output.
Some shells may provide a builtin pwd command which is similar or identi- cal to this utility. Consult the builtin(1) manual page.

ランキング
